title: Assertion Trigger on FULL OUTER JOIN with more than two BETWEEN clauses
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(x INT, y INT CHECK (x >= 0 AND y >= 0));
CREATE TABLE t2(a INT, b INT DEFAULT 10);
INSERT INTO t1(x, y) VALUES (1, 2), (3, 4), (5, NULL);
SELECT * FROM t1 LEFT JOIN t2 ON (x BETWEEN a AND b OR y BETWEEN a AND b OR a BETWEEN x AND y) UNION SELECT * FROM t1 RIGHT JOIN t2 ON (x BETWEEN a AND b OR y BETWEEN a AND b OR a BETWEEN x AND y);
key_bug_features: FULL OUTER JOIN with multiple BETWEEN clauses
